title: Tabs
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Tabs primitive preserving model-owned selected and highlighted values, root/list/tab/panel/indicator attributes, manual and automatic activation, orientation, disabled tabs, keyboard navigation, and panel mounting policy.

deviations.summary: Selected and highlighted tab values are model-owned inputs instead of hidden component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit components preserve unidirectional data flow. The primitive emits value and highlight change payloads so consumers can update the model and run focus commands explicitly.

deviations.summary: Indicator CSS variable geometry is accepted as data instead of measured inside the render helper.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit render helpers are pure. DOM measurement belongs in a consumer command or runtime boundary, while the primitive still exposes the origin indicator attributes and CSS variable names.
